4. Any existing export functionality in the project (CSV, Excel export patterns)

Working directory: D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace

Report:
- All relevant file paths and their purposes
- The data model (what fields does feedback data have)
- Existing API endpoints for feedback
- Any existing export patterns in the codebase

content.text: I'll systematically search both the server and web codebases for feedback-related code and export patterns.
